The **Belgium national under-19 football team** is the national under-19 [football](/wiki/Football_(soccer) "Football (soccer)") team of [Belgium](/wiki/Belgium "Belgium") and is controlled by the [Belgian Football Association](/wiki/Belgian_Football_Association "Belgian Football Association"). The team competes in the [European Under-19 Football Championship](/wiki/European_Under-19_Football_Championship "European Under-19 Football Championship"), held every year. Their biggest success was winning the tournament in 1977, albeit it wore a different name and had a different structure back then.
